servinfo.title: Replacement of Emergency Repaired Tire with Sealant

item.ptxt: Damage to health may result if you do not observe the precautions in Precautions for Emergency Flat Tire Repair Kit (If Equipped) when performing the procedure below.
Be sure to observe the precautions when handling the flat tire repaired with the sealant.
Sealant may leak out when releasing air from tires, which can result in damage to health.
Take care not to cause the sealant to leak out, and release air from the tires slowly.

s1.ptxt: Remove repaired tire with wheel from vehicle.
Wipe off repair sealant from repaired tire and wheel.
Replace valve core with a new one.
Install wheel fitted with new tire to vehicle.
